calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-30-2025 Continued To Jul-30-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion And Notice Of Hearing (Motions)
Off Calendar Jun-11-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Dept: 505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Bailiff: Deputy Jones; Reported by "For the Record" commencing at 10:17:23 a.m., and concluding at 10:37:11 a.m.(D505)

This matter came on calendar this day for request of default judgment against Defendant TIN RX/Castro San Francisco and TIN RX, The Independent Network, Inc.

Appearances:
Stephanie Foster, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference representing Plaintiff FC 2175 Market LP
Jocelyn Maldonado, sworn to testify via Zoom Video Conference.

The Court has reviewed the additional filings Plaintiff has filed and provided.

The Court examines the witness.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendants jointly and severally as follows:

The Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendants:

Damages $387,126.06
Pre-Judgment Interest at 10% $44,970.26
Costs $5,981.59
Attorney's Fees $23,725.50
Other $0

Total Judgment $461,803.41

Proposed judgment as modified signed and executed this day.
